A

add(Ndarray) - Method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Returns a new array resulting from element-wise addition with another array.
ADD - Enum constant in enum class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Operator
Addition
addInPlace(Ndarray) - Method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Performs in-place element-wise addition with another array.
arrange(int) - Static method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Convenience factory method to create a 1D array with values from 0 (inclusive) to end (exclusive) with a step of 1.
arrange(int, int) - Static method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Convenience factory method to create a 1D array with values from 0 (inclusive) to end (exclusive) with a given step.
arrange(int, int, int) - Static method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Convenience factory method to create a 1D array with values from start (inclusive) to end (exclusive) with a given step.
astype(Dtype) - Method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Returns a new array converted to another dtype.

get(int...) - Method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Gets an element from n-dimensional coordinates.
getDim() - Method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndim
Returns the number of dimensions of the array.
getDimension(int) - Method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Shape
Returns the size of a specific dimension given its index.
getDimensions() - Method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Shape
Returns the dimensions of the array as an array of integers.
getDtype() - Method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Returns the data type of the array.
getItemSizeInBytes() - Method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Returns the size in bytes of a single item in the array based on its dtype.
getJavaClass() - Method in enum class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Dtype
Returns the corresponding Java class for the data type.
getNdim() - Method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Returns the number of dimensions of the array.
getShape() - Method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Returns the shape of the array.
getSizeInBytes() - Method in enum class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Dtype
Returns the size in bytes of the data type.

N

ndarray(List<Object>) - Static method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Convenience factory method to create a 1D array from a List with default DOUBLE dtype.
ndarray(List<Object>, Shape) - Static method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Convenience factory method to create a 1D array from a List.
ndarray(List<Object>, Shape, Dtype) - Static method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Convenience factory method to create an array from a List.
Ndarray - Class in com.antoine_tommy.ndarray
A n-dimensional array structure inspired by NumPy arrays.
Ndarray(Shape) - Constructor for class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Creates a new array with the given shape and DOUBLE dtype.
Ndarray(Shape, Dtype) - Constructor for class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Creates a new array with the given shape and dtype.
Ndarray(Object[], Shape, Dtype) - Constructor for class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Creates an array from an existing flat buffer.
Ndim - Class in com.antoine_tommy.ndarray
This class represents the number of dimensions of an array.
Ndim() - Constructor for class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndim
Constructs an Ndim object with a default number of dimensions (1).
Ndim(int) - Constructor for class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndim
Constructs an Ndim object with the specified number of dimensions.

operator(Dtype, Operator, Object, Object) - Static method in enum class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Dtype
Perform an operation on two data.
Operator - Enum Class in com.antoine_tommy.ndarray
This enum represents the operations allowed on elements in an array.

R

reshape(int...) - Method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Convenience method to reshape using varargs for dimensions.
reshape(Shape) - Method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Returns a new array with the same data but another shape.

S

set(Object, int...) - Method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Sets an element at n-dimensional coordinates.
Shape - Class in com.antoine_tommy.ndarray
This class represents the shape of an array, which is defined by its dimensions and the size of each dimension.
Shape() - Constructor for class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Shape
Constructs a Shape object with a default dimension of 1.
Shape(int...) - Constructor for class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Shape
Constructs a Shape object with the specified dimensions.
size() - Method in class com.antoine_tommy.ndarray.Ndarray
Returns the total number of elements in the array.

Performs in-place element-wise subtraction with another array.
